vision_report.narrative_description: Upon meticulous review of the chronological image stack, it is evident that the registry does not match the physical reality. The pots are devoid of the specified plants (P1-P4). The environment appears to be a dormant or failed botanical setup where the soil remains, but the biological occupants have been removed or have perished completely. No growth, decay, or movement was detected over the 5-day observation window.
